name: snapshot-create
_note: cognitive-replay.snapshot-create captures an immutable, shareable snapshot of the caller's cognitive window from the live corpus on globalThis._concordSTATE.sessions. The assassin's internal owner actor has an EMPTY corpus (no seeded chat sessions), so every fuzz case returns ok:false with error 'no_activity_to_snapshot' — the macro REFUSES to mint a snapshot over zero activity, which is the correct fail-CLOSED behavior under the harness. When real activity exists, shareId is a 16-hex crypto id, sinceDays clamps to [1,365], and title clamps to 120 chars (the XSS probe is stored verbatim as a string, never executed; the frontend renders it as text). Round-trip create→list→get→delete + per-user isolation are pinned behaviorally in server/tests/cognitive-replay-lens-macros.test.js with a seeded corpus.
